TestSOSFiltFiltr
z1Test equivalence between sosfiltfilt and filtfiltr
ffffff
order=%s)
err_msgN)
)	rJ
y_sosrN
test_equivalence
z TestSOSFiltFilt.test_equivalenceN)
    An alternative implementation of filtfilt with Gustafsson edges.
    This function computes the same result as
    `scipy.signal.signaltools._filtfilt_gust`, but only 1-d arrays
    are accepted.  The problem is solved using `fmin` from `scipy.optimize`.
    `_filtfilt_gust` is significanly faster than this implementation.
    c
z-Objective function used in filtfilt_gust_opt.r@
icsrL
z0br
y_fb
y_bZ
y_bf
valuerN
filtfilt_gust_opt_func
z1filtfilt_gust_opt.<locals>.filtfilt_gust_opt_funcr@
xtolZ
ftolZ
maxfun
maxiterZ
full_outputZ
dispr
z5minimization failed in filtfilt_gust_opt: warnflag=%dr
result
optZ
foptZ
niterZ
funcallsZ
warnflagr
filtfilt_gust_opt
z'check_filtfilt_gust.<locals>.<listcomp>r
empty_liker
zg1Z
xxZ	out_shaper
zo1Z
zo2Z
indxrN
check_filtfilt_gust
d	|	
measure>
dict
keysr
true_methodr\
method_try
timesZ

ellipre
approx_impulse_lenrL

lengthrN
test_filtfilt_gust!

)	N)
